skills.name: upload-image
skills.description: Upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG) to 888box. Returns a share URL and direct CDN URL.

skills.name: upload-video
skills.description: Upload a video file (MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV) to 888box. Returns a share URL and direct URL.

skills.name: upload-file
skills.description: Upload a generic document or file to 888box. Returns a share URL and direct URL.

skills.name: upload-audio
skills.description: Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, FLAC) to 888box. Returns a share URL and direct URL.

skills.name: search-assets
skills.description: Search stored assets by keyword across title, path and URL. Returns matching assets with share URLs.

skills.name: list-assets
skills.description: List stored assets with pagination. Supports filtering by type (image, video, audio, file).

skills.name: mcp-tools
skills.description: MCP server exposing upload, list, search, and view tools for AI agent integration.
